entries.title: Added matrix rain effect
entries.content: Implemented canvas-based digital rain background with configurable speed and density.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Refactored routing system
entries.content: Replaced hash-based router with History API, added lazy loading for views.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: New color palette: neon amber
entries.content: Added --neon-amber variable and updated hover states for better contrast.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Fixed mobile viewport issues
entries.content: Adjusted media queries for devices under 430px, improved touch targets.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Integrated busuanzi counter
entries.content: Added visitor statistics using busuanzi, visible in footer.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Created archive page
entries.content: New /archive route listing old projects and resources from cache.json.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Optimized font loading
entries.content: Preload Fira Code and JetBrains Mono, fallback to monospace.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Added Discord invite widget
entries.content: Embedded gateway preview with member count and online status.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Service worker registration
entries.content: Enabled offline fallback page and asset caching for critical resources.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Glitch animation on hover
entries.content: Applied subtle glitch effect to menu links when hovered.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Updated README and docs
entries.content: Added project structure explanation and setup instructions.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Bumped dependencies
entries.content: Updated webpack, babel, and postcss to latest versions.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Experimental WebGL background
entries.content: Three.js test scene behind terminal panel (disabled by default).
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Fixed scroll restoration
entries.content: Router now saves and restores scroll position on navigation.
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Added terminal sound effects
entries.content: Optional keystroke clicks and beeps (disabled by default).
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Reddit scraping module (internal)
entries.content: Tool to fetch domain discussions from r/domains (for Domain Hunter).
entries.author: Other

entries.title: Launch of cyberpunk theme
entries.content: Complete redesign with neon borders, matrix green, and glassmorphism.
entries.author: Other
